SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ApigeeBundle
Represents a parsed Apigee API proxy bundle.
ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Main entry point for converting Apigee API proxy bundles to OpenAPI 3.0 specifications.
ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException
Exception thrown when conversion fails.
BundleParser
Main parser for Apigee API proxy bundles.
ConversionOptions
Configuration options for the Apigee to OpenAPI conversion.
ConversionOptions.Builder
Builder for ConversionOptions.
ConversionResult
Result of an Apigee to OpenAPI conversion.
ConversionResult.Builder
Builder for ConversionResult.
Flow
Represents an Apigee Flow configuration.
Flow.FlowType
 
FlowConditionParser
Parser for Apigee flow condition strings.
OpenApiGenerator
Generates OpenAPI 3.0 specification from extracted Apigee bundle data.
OpenApiWriter
Writes OpenAPI specifications to various output formats (JSON, YAML) and destinations.
OpenApiWriter.OpenApiWriterException
Exception thrown when writing fails.
OpenApiWriter.OutputFormat
Output format for the OpenAPI specification.
ParameterExtractor
Extracts parameter information from Apigee policies and flow conditions.
ParameterExtractor.ExtractedParameters
Result of parameter extraction for a specific operation.
PathExtractor
Extracts API paths and operations from Apigee proxy configuration.
PathExtractor.ExtractedOperation
Represents an extracted operation (path + method combination).
PathExtractor.PathExtractionResult
Result of path extraction.
Policy
Base class representing an Apigee Policy.
Policy.ParameterInfo
Represents parameter information extracted from a policy.
Policy.ParameterInfo.Location
 
Policy.PolicyType
Supported policy types for extraction.
PolicyParser
Parser for Apigee Policy XML files.
ProxyDescriptorParser
Parser for the main Apigee API Proxy descriptor XML file.
ProxyEndpoint
Represents an Apigee ProxyEndpoint configuration.
ProxyEndpointParser
Parser for Apigee ProxyEndpoint XML files.
RouteRule
Represents an Apigee RouteRule configuration.
SecurityExtractor
Extracts security scheme information from Apigee policies.
SecurityExtractor.SecurityExtractionResult
Result of security extraction for the bundle.
SecurityExtractor.SecurityScheme
Represents an extracted security scheme.
SecurityExtractor.SecurityScheme.In
 
SecurityExtractor.SecurityScheme.Type
 
Step
Represents a Step within an Apigee Flow.
TargetEndpoint
Represents an Apigee TargetEndpoint configuration.
TargetEndpointParser
Parser for Apigee TargetEndpoint XML files.
